description_long: This object is a pump-action shotgun with a robust, utilitarian design, featuring a dark metal barrel and receiver paired with a wooden stock and fore-end. The barrel is relatively short and fitted with a prominent muzzle brake or compensator at the tip, which has multiple vent holes. The wooden stock is full-sized, smoothly contoured, and finished in a medium brown, providing a classic appearance and ergonomic grip. The fore-end is also wooden, ribbed for better handling, and clearly designed to be pumped back and forth to cycle the action. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, enclosing a single trigger. The overall construction suggests durability and functionality, suitable for urban law enforcement or civilian defense scenarios.
description: A pump-action shotgun with a dark metal barrel, muzzle brake, and classic wooden stock and fore-end. The design is robust and functional, with ribbed wood for grip and a rounded trigger guard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle brake and the alignment of the barrel, with the ribbed fore-end visible below.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the wooden stock, ribbed fore-end, and the dark metal receiver and barrel.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the butt of the wooden stock and the straight alignment of the barrel and receiver.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with clear visibility of the trigger guard and pump mechanism.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a vented muzzle brake
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no finger grooves
